metadata.title: HERO Serviced Office | Premium Office Space in Manila
metadata.description: HERO Serviced Office, Inc. offers premium serviced offices in Manila, Philippines. Perfect for Japanese companies expanding into the Philippines. Located on Ayala Avenue, Makati with full support system.

footer.tagline: Your gateway to professional workspace solutions in Manila.
footer.copyright: © {year} HERO Serviced Office, Inc. All rights reserved.
footer.peza: PEZA Certified | Serviced Office in Makati

hero.title: Your Gateway to Business Success in the
hero.description: Premium serviced offices in the heart of Makati City. Perfect for Japanese companies expanding into the Philippines market.

features.title: Why Choose HERO Serviced Office?
features.subtitle: We provide comprehensive office solutions with Japanese-standard service quality right in the heart of Manila's business district.
features.excellentLocationDesc: Conveniently located along Ayala Avenue, the central business district of Makati City.
features.fullSupportDesc: Japanese-speaking staff ready to assist with all your business needs and concerns.
features.comfortableSpaceDesc: Ample shared space and well-equipped offices to help start your business.
features.professionalSupportDesc: Comprehensive business support for Japanese companies operating in the Philippines.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Flexible office solutions tailored to your business needs
services.privateOfficesDesc: Fully furnished private offices with modern amenities and flexible lease terms.
services.sharedOfficesDesc: Collaborative workspaces designed for networking and productivity.
services.coworkingDesc: Open-plan work areas with access to all office facilities and a vibrant community.
services.virtualOfficesDesc: Professional business address and call handling services for remote businesses.
services.conferenceRoomsDesc: State-of-the-art meeting rooms equipped with video conferencing capabilities.

benefits.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
benefits.subtitle: Our offices come fully equipped with modern facilities and amenities to ensure your business operates smoothly from day one.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by Japanese companies expanding into the Philippines
testimonials.testimonial1: HERO Serviced Office made our expansion to the Philippines seamless. The Japanese-speaking staff is incredibly helpful.
testimonials.testimonial2: The location on Ayala Avenue is perfect for our business. Professional environment with excellent facilities.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Business in the Philippines?
cta.subtitle: Contact us today for a personalized tour and discover the perfect office solution for your business.

hero.title: About HERO Serviced Office
hero.subtitle: Supporting Japanese business expansion in the Philippines since 2019

company.title: Company Overview
company.description: HERO Serviced Office, Inc. is a leading provider of serviced office solutions in Manila, Philippines. We specialize in supporting Japanese companies with their expansion into the Philippine market, offering fully equipped office spaces with Japanese-standard service quality.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading serviced office provider in the Philippines, empowering international businesses to thrive in the Asian market through world-class facilities and exceptional support services.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide flexible, professional office solutions that enable businesses to focus on growth while we handle the operational complexities. We bridge cultural and business gaps for Japanese companies entering the Philippine market.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
values.excellenceDesc: We maintain Japanese-quality standards in all our services and facilities.
values.supportDesc: Comprehensive bilingual support to ensure smooth business operations.
values.flexibilityDesc: Flexible terms and customizable solutions to meet your unique needs.
values.communityDesc: Building a network of Japanese businesses in the Philippines.

locations.title: Our Locations
locations.subtitle: Conveniently located in the heart of Makati's business district

whyChooseUs.title: Why Businesses Trust Us
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We understand the unique needs of international businesses
whyChooseUs.japaneseHoursDesc: We align our operations with Japanese business hours for seamless coordination.
whyChooseUs.bilingualDesc: Our team speaks both Japanese and English for effective communication.
whyChooseUs.privacyDesc: Secure facilities with strict confidentiality protocols for your business.
